body:
Leo, great catching up with you briefly at the [Breakthrough Energy](orgs/breakthrough-energy) summit last week — always good to compare notes in person. I wanted to follow up on our conversation about the grid-edge storage space, specifically around a company we've been tracking called [Voltaic Meridian](companies/voltaic-meridian) that I think would be right in your wheelhouse for a co-investment conversation. We led their seed last fall at a $12M pre-money, and they're now gearing up for a Series A in Q3 with some genuinely differentiated technology on the thermal regulation side. Given Benchmark's recent activity in climate infra, I thought it made sense to loop you in before we go broad with the round. Happy to set up a call with the founders if there's appetite on your end — let me know what your calendar looks like in May.

Amara
